testcase.name: test_forged_or_tampered_image_binding_fails_before_provider_io[bare_same_fingerprint]
testcase.failure: tests/tools/test_provider_boundary_adversarial.py:282: in test_forged_or_tampered_image_binding_fails_before_provider_io assert provider_io == [] E AssertionError: assert [{'_runtime_b...gpt-image-2'}] == [] E E Left contains one more item: {'_runtime_binding': ImageGenRequestBinding(provider='codex', model='gpt-image-2'), 'model': 'gpt-image-2'} E Use -v to get more diff
